subject: Double charged for October
body: I just noticed two identical charges of $49 on my card for October. I only have one subscription. Please refund the extra one.

subject: How do I export my data?
body: Is there a way to export all my records to CSV? I want a backup.

subject: Reset my password
body: I can't remember my password and the reset email never arrives.

subject: Site is completely down
body: The whole dashboard returns a blank page for everyone on my team since 10 minutes ago. Nothing loads.

subject: Add dark mode please
body: Would love a dark theme for late-night work. Any plans?

subject: Cancel my subscription
body: I'd like to cancel before my next renewal. How do I do that?

subject: Where's my refund?
body: I was told two weeks ago I would get a refund and I still see nothing. Update please.

subject: API returns 500 on /users
body: Since this morning, GET /v1/users returns a 500 for about 1 in 5 requests. Other endpoints are fine.

subject: Invoice VAT is wrong
body: My latest invoice charged 20% VAT but my company is VAT-exempt. Can you correct it and reissue?

subject: Can't log in, 2FA broken
body: My authenticator app was reset and now I am locked out. I need access to my account today.

subject: Feature: bulk CSV import
body: It would save me hours if I could import a CSV of 500 contacts at once instead of one by one.

subject: Customer data leaked?!
body: A customer emailed me a screenshot showing another customer’s records inside their account. This looks like a data leak.

subject: Change email on account
body: I want to update the email address associated with my login to a new one.

subject: Fed up — about to switch to a competitor
body: This is the third time this has broken. I've wasted a whole day. Honestly I'm ready to move my whole team to a competitor unless someone actually helps.

subject: Docs link 404s
body: The "Webhooks" link in your documentation footer returns a 404.

subject: A few unrelated things at once
body: First, billing looks off. Second, the export is slow. Third, can you add SSO? Fourth, the mobile app logged me out. Sorry for the wall of text!

subject: Upgrade to enterprise plan
body: We're growing and want to move to the enterprise plan. What's the process and pricing?

subject: Mobile app crashes on open
body: The iOS app crashes instantly on launch after the latest update. Reinstalling did not help.
